Melchior d'Hondecoeter

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Hunter's Bag on a Terrace
by Melchior d'Hondecoeter
Dutch Golden Age · 1678
A heap of dead hare, birds, and a falcon on a balustrade, gorgeously feathered in death. Hondecoeter was the century's great painter of animals — alive for sport, dead for display.
←Paul Cézanne Marco d'Oggiono→
